entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition | 2023 FPS02 Release – Part 1
entry.content:
Hi Stephan,

thanks for reading my blog post.
The innovations contained in this blog are only valid for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 FPS02. For SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, please consult the What's New Viewer here.

Best Regards
Christian

entry.title: SAP TechEd 2024 Announcements - Consolidated and Simplified
entry.content:
In this blog, I have consolidated everything related to SAP TechEd 2024 in one place! Hope this will help the community.

Note: Don't miss the list of all the links of news, recordings, source-code, demo etc. towards the end of this blog.

 

First let's have a quick summary of all the key announcements.

 

 

Let's go in detail.

SAP Build + ABAP Cloud

  • SAP Build unifies the entire development and extension capabilities and will now also include ABAP Cloud.
  • Technically, it means that SAP Build will integrate ABAP development tools and ABAP development environments for SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP BTP.
  • Developers will also be able to create and monitor their ABAP Cloud projects directly from SAP Build.
  • It will be available by Q4 2024.
  • SAP Build Lobby will be the central starting point for all extension projects.

Demo of SAP Build Lobby

 

SAP Build for S/4HANA Extension Development

  • A new extensibility wizard is available now which will let developers access SAP Build directly from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 
  • With this, developers can extend custom fields, business logic and processes either on-stack (deployed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP environment) or side-by-side (deployed in SAP BTP).
  • In Q4 2024, the extensibility wizard will let developers create custom SAP Fiori and SAPUI5 applications, leveraging the full set of features available in SAP Build.

 

New Generative AI Capabilities of SAP Build with Joule

  • New capabilities in SAP Build Code such as code explanation and documentation search will reduce development time for Java and JavaScript developers (Q4 2024).
  • Developers will also be able to automate workflows in SAP Build Process Automation with assistance from generative AI (Q4 2024)
  • ABAP developers will be able to generate high-quality code and unit tests with Joule that comply with SAP’s ABAP Cloud Development model, and also generate explanations for legacy code, making it easier to modernize legacy codebases and migrate to a clean core (Q1 2025)
  • Developers will also be able to enhance Joule with custom skills using Joule studio in SAP Build, integrating it seamlessly with both SAP and non-SAP applications (Q1 2025)

For more information on SAP Build, refer to SAP Build.

 

Joule with SAP Build Work Zone

  • Joule will also be integrated into SAP Build Work Zone (Q4 2024)
  • It will be available in SAP Build Work Zone standard edition, the SAP Start site and the SAP Mobile Start app.

 

Joule with Collaborative AI Agents

  • SAP will infuse Joule with multiple autonomous AI agents that will combine their unique expertise to collaboratively accomplish complex workflows (Q4 2024)
  • With an in-built agentic capability, Joule can now solve complex business problems for you through planning, self-reflection, logical reasoning and collaboration.
  • Developers will be able to extend Joule by building their own autonomous AI agent use cases with SAP Build (Q1 2025)

Joule Agent Demo

 

Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

  • Joule will be available for all SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers (Q4 2024)
  • Joule capabilities will expand to support key functions including sales professionals, warehouse clerks and project managers (Q1 of 2025)

 

Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

  • Following the introduction of Joule into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition in July, SAP launched a feature pack with new use cases that let business users instruct Joule with simple commands.
  • The feature pack includes a new implementation wizard that installs a model outlining criteria to evaluate extensions built with low-code, no-code and pro-code tools on SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP.
  • Joule will be incorporated into the top 300 most-frequently-used SAP Fiori apps (Q4 2024)
  • Joule will also be able to take master data change requests within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, so users don’t have to navigate across multiple menus.

 

Joule in SAP BTP

  • Joule will be available to use with SAP HANA Cloud in SAP BTP cockpit (Q4 2024)
  • Joule will be incorporated into SAP BTP cockpit (Q4 2024)
  • Joule can be directed to perform transactional scenarios like creating a subaccount, onboarding users, and answering questions about SAP BTP administrations in general. 

 

Joule in Other SAP Solutions

  • Joule will be available in the SAP Service Cloud solution and SAP Concur solutions (Q1 2025)
  • SAP now offers Joule across the SAP Integrated Business Planning solution, the SAP Digital Manufacturing solution, and the SAP Asset Performance Management application.
  • SAP will continue to roll out Joule across the entire SAP Supply Chain portfolio.
  • Joule will be available in the SAP Sales Cloud solution with navigational and task-management assistance (Q4 2024)
  • Joule will help SAP LeanIX solutions users manage and optimize their IT landscape (Q4 2024)
  • Joule will be available with SAP Signavio (Q4 2024)
  • Joule will be available in SAP Mobile Start (Q4 2024)      

 

Joule studio in SAP Build

  • SAP will release Joule studio in SAP Build (Q4 2024).
  • Joule studio will provide a dedicated environment for businesses to create, deploy, monitor and manage custom skills for Joule developed with low-code, no-code capabilities.
  • Custom skills, which complement Joule’s out-of-the-box capabilities from SAP, extend conversational AI to organization-specific workflows.
  • Additionally, customers can now integrate any third-party system into Joule for an entirely integrated conversational user experience.

 

SAP Knowledge Graph

  • SAP announces the addition of a knowledge graph engine to SAP HANA Cloud (Q1 2025)
  • The knowledge graph engine will let users identify and understand complex relationships in their data not otherwise discoverable using traditional data modeling tools.
  • SAP announces SAP Knowledge Graph, a new solution that will unlock the full value of SAP data by connecting it with the rich business context captured in SAP applications.
  • Accessible through SAP Datasphere and Joule in Q1 2025, it will help root AI in SAP-specific business semantics, reducing the risk of inaccurate or irrelevant results.
  • In its initial release, this solution will focus on SAP S/4HANA, providing a semantic layer that connects over 450,000 ABAP tables, 80,000 CDS views and thousands of SAP Fiori applications, along with OData APIs and entity sets.

 

SAP HANA Cloud Knowledge Graph Engine

  • Knowledge graph engine will be added to SAP HANA Cloud (Q1 2025)
  • By combining the vector engine and the knowledge graph engine, you can harness the power of structured and unstructured data together.

 

SAP Expands Strategic AI Partnerships

  • Anthropic: SAP introduces Anthropic’s Claude 3.5 Sonnet in Amazon Bedrock to generative AI hub.
  • HCLTech: HCLTech announces a newly built AI Center of Excellence in Munich focused on developing AI use cases for the AI Foundation on SAP BTP.
  • IBM: SAP announces the addition of IBM Granite, IBM’s flagship series of transparent and efficient LLMs, to the growing repository of AI models available in generative AI hub.
  • Meta: SAP continues to execute its multi-vendor strategy for LLMs with the addition of Meta Llama 3.1 70B, which is built to deliver performance and cost efficiency.
  • Mistral AI: SAP continues to expand its partnership with Mistral AI by adding Mistral Large 2 to generative AI hub.
  • PwC: PwC announces it is using generative AI capabilities based on SAP’s generative AI hub.

 

Generative AI Hub + ABAP

  • Developers will be able to access generative AI hub capabilities from custom ABAP applications using the ABAP AI SDK powered by the intelligent scenario lifecycle management for SAP S/4HANA Cloud functionality. 
  • Using the ABAP AI SDK, ABAP developers can easily infuse AI capabilities into their custom applications and extensions.

 

Generative AI Hub – New LLMs Support

New LLMs will be available for generative AI hub by the end of 2024, including:

  • Aleph Alpha Pharia-1
  • Amazon Titan Image Generator
  • IBM Granite
  • Mistral Large 2
  • OpenAI Dall-E 3

 

Generative AI Hub – New Data Centers

New data centers for generative AI hub by the end of Q4 2024:

  • AWS: Singapore
  • Google Cloud Platform: Australia (Sydney); Japan (Osaka)
  • Microsoft Azure: Australia (Sydney); Switzerland (Zurich)

 

Generative AI Hub – Other Updates

  • We will be able to integrate advanced AI capabilities into web apps with new SDK support for ABAP, Java, and JavaScript in generative AI hub (Q4 2024)
  • Orchestration improvements to the generative AI hub capability in SAP AI Core and SAP AI Launchpad that will enable document grounding and indexing pipelines (Q4 2024)

 

New generative AI functionality for customers move to the cloud faster

  • SAP announced a new generative AI functionality that helps customers move to the cloud faster (Q1 2025).
  • Accessed through the SAP Cloud ALM solution, customers and consultants will be able to get expert answers, proactive guidance, and task automation aligned with the RISE with SAP Methodology.

 

SAP Expands its Portfolio of Learning and Certification Offerings

  • SAP launches new role-based certifications, free training materials and hands-on opportunities for developers and tech professionals.
  • These includes 60 new self-paced learning journeys, trial experiences and solution demonstrations that help tech professionals benefit from the latest fully integrated and practical training.

 

SAP Datasphere

  • SAP announced new embedded data lake capabilities for SAP Datasphere (Q4 2024)
  • Built on SAP HANA Cloud SQL on files and data lake file service capabilities, it will expand the business data fabric architecture with a data lake option, complementing existing storage solutions.
  • This helps businesses access, manage, and analyze data across cloud and hybrid environments while preserving its context and logic, improving decision-making, operational efficiency, and AI-driven innovation.

 

New embedded data lake capabilities

  • An integrated object store, which provides a simpler way to store large amounts of data, making it easier for businesses to expand their storage as needed.
  • Spark compute, which facilitates efficient data transformation and processing based on existing SAP Datasphere data integration capabilities.
  • SQL on files functionality, which lets developers access data in the integrated object store without needing to physically copy the data.

These capabilities let users import and integrate data at scale while maintaining a consistent user experience that ensures seamless data integration from both SAP sources (including SAP S/4HANA and SAP Business Warehouse) and non-SAP sources while preserving the original structure and context of the data.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud

  • SAP announced general availability of the new SAP Analytics Cloud compass feature (Q1 2025)
  • SAP Analytics Cloud compass feature can be used to model complex risk scenarios and simulate a broad range of probable outcomes.

 

SAP Integration Suite

  • SAP Integration Suite, starter edition will offer an unlimited number of prepackaged SAP integrations and a fixed number of customizable integrations for GROW with SAP and SAP SuccessFactors customers (Q4 2024)
  • New integration adapters will allow users manage data from various third-party technology platforms, including Anaplan, Coupa, HubSpot, NetSuite ERP, Snowflake, and more.
  • AI supported custom script optimization (2025)
  • AI support iFlow creation is now Generally Available

 

SAP TechEd 2024 - Recordings and News

SAP TechEd keynote replay - https://www.youtube.com/live/VUp4nt3zNCg

SAP TechEd News Guide 2024 - https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide.html

SAP TechEd 2023 Executive Keynote - Highlights - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-teched-2023-executive-keynote-highlights/ba-p/13576476

SAP TechEd Keynote 2024 – Technology Highlights - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-teched-keynote-2024-technology-highlights/ba-p/13891880

Joule with Collaborative Capabilities - TechEd Announement - https://news.sap.com/2024/10/sap-teched-copilot-joule-collaborative-capabilities-enterprise-ai/

SAP Build’s Next Leap: Generative AI and ABAP - https://news.sap.com/2024/10/sap-build-generative-ai-abap/

SAP Business AI: Release Highlights Q3 2024 - https://news.sap.com/2024/10/sap-business-ai-q3-release/

SAP Galvanizes its Developer Community with New SAP Build Capabilities - https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/application-development-and-automation.html

SAP Transforms Joule with Collaborative AI Agents - https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/ai.html#sap-transforms-joule-with-collaborative-ai-agents

SAP Knowledge Graph to Unlock Business Context Across SAP Ecosystem - https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/ai.html#sap-knowledge-graph-unlock-business-context-across-sap-ecosystem

Cloud ERP announcements - https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/cloud-erp.html

Data and Analytics announcements - https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/data-and-analytics.html

SAP Integration Suite announcements - https://www.sap.com/events/teched/news-guide/integration.html

 

List of GitHub Repositories for SAP TechEd Hands-on Sessions

Build your own generative AI scenario in a Snap - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-AI180 

Use SAP Integration Suite with SAP IBP and third-party systems - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-IN280 

Build AI-enabled intelligent data apps - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-AI280 

Set up Joule to answer questions in your own policy documents - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-XP180 

Build SAP Fiori Apps with ABAP Cloud powered by Joule's ABAP developer capabilities - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-AD180 

SAP TechEd 2024 Developer keynote [deconstructed]: Keeping the promise - https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-developer-keynote 

Explore SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud End-to-End- https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-DA180 

From clicks to code: Managing your SAP BTP infrastructure with Terraform- https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-XP280 

Future-proof your SAP PI/PO investments with SAP Integration Suite- https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-IN180 

Develop applications and processes with SAP Build and Joule- https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-AD181 

Cloud ERP Extensibility- https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-DT280 

Integrating SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP IBP using SAP Integration Suite- https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-DT180 

Build a chatbot with SAP Build Apps and SAP AI Core- https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2024-developer-keynote/tree/main/topics/DEV100A-build-chatbot-apps-aicore 

 

Hope this will help! Let me know if I have missed anything important 😊

entry.title: Re: SAP CAL always same SID
entry.content: We are also facing similar issue, The SID S4H is already registered in our landscape and CAL always deploys with same SID. In this case how do we register the system to generate licenses ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I am a fresher from Vietnam, eager to start my career in the SAP field. As a woman, I believe this certification would be a valuable stepping stone for my professional growth.

Although new to SAP, I am highly motivated to learn and contribute to the industry. This certification is an exciting opportunity for me to gain valuable skills and advance my career.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Quyen

entry.title: Re: Select the file from the desktop and attach the document in Email
entry.content: so_new_document_att_send_api1 and all these "so" function modules for emails are obsolete. Use CL_BCS instead.

entry.title: Re: How we can filter Odata data in SAP BUILD APP.
entry.content: Hi @Mani2211, you have to create a data entity from the Data tab and then a data variable from UI Canvas based on the Data entity. Then you will see the filter options where you can filter by User ID, Employee Name. See the Step 2: Create a data variable here https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/codejam-03-cart-page.html#b4acade7-4a22-4f0a-b6d3-2db3666acb02 for an example.

entry.content:
Hello,

you can do that in the transaction OX10.

We are just exploring if its possible to print a webpage without the use of SAPScript/Smartforms/Adobe forms. Other threads suggested that in SAP, forms output is converted to OTF/PDF for printing. However, will check further on this. Thank you for your help!

/Rune

entry.title: How to create a custom WSDL in SAP CPI with some custom fields.
entry.content:
• We are required to pull the message/data from Oracle a On-prem database using SOAP Webservice URL into SAP CPI Integration Suite.
  • The Sender system (i.e. Oracle) do not have an option to share the WSDL from their end. The sender has shared with us a sample XML structure with the sample fields. Sample XML Structure Shared below:

<?xml version="1.0"?>

<Output>

<MessageId>1</MessageId>

<BatchId>Tanmay</BatchId>                                                   

<BusinessPartner>Patil</BusinessPartner>

<OracleNumber>1234567890</OracleNumber>

<Status>S</Status>

<Message>Data Loaded Successfully.</Message>

<TimeStamp>18-APR-24</TimeStamp>                                             

</Output>

  • Is it possible to create custom WSDLs with some specific fields for SOAP Sender Adapter. The sender needs a WSDL file for configuring the SOAP Adapter. Is there a way to create a WSDL inside CPI?
  • We need alternative ways for generating WSDL file in SAP CPI.
  • Is there any existing or pre integration connector to use it?

entry.title: Re: Block PO creation if not associated to PR
entry.content:
hello,

you have to assign field selection to the users.

It is not active by default.

Please check: 2048405 - How to control and check the field layout for specific users in PO - SAP ERP & SAP

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David, 

Hope you are fine.

Please Share Campaign code. Thank you in Advance

entry.title: SAC Tunnel Live Connection SAP HANA error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I tried to make a Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA using Tunnel (Protocol type is TCP SSL) but I got the error "You are not authorized to query the remote system. Please ask your administrator to grant you the InA role" (image 1).
But in HANA I have set the InA permission for my account (image 2).
Then I use Chrome Developer tools to track the error to "https://<tenant> .analytics.cloud.sap/lcs/scc/tunnel/tunnel/sap/bc/ina/service/v2/GetServerInfo"  and got the error: "The connection could not be retrieved. connectionName: tunnel remotePath: /sap/bc/ina/service/v2/GetServerInfo" (image 3)
Thank you
Regards.
Thanh Hieu

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!

As I plan to pursue certification, I would greatly appreciate any support, such as a voucher, to assist with this next step. 

Regards,

Naveera

Appreciate your feedback. Thank you

Kind Regards

Henny

entry.title: Re: Extraneous module (punycode) preventing from deployin...

entry.title: Re: Need to disable Suggested Field Values in Personas Sl...
entry.content:
Hi, 

What is appearing on the 2nd screenshot is browser, Chrome feature. Try to disable any autofill in Chrome Settings. 

I see that "sap-se-valuesuggest=0" works here.

Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: Specific description of CoA:YCOA
entry.content:
Check out https://help.sap.com/docs/s4hana-best-practices/ycoa/list-of-accounts

Best regards,
Jonathan

entry.title: Integration between SAP Cloud ALM and SharePoint
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

SAP Cloud ALM , #Document in Cloud ALM , SAP Cloud ALM , SAP Solution Manager 

I'm looking at integration with SharePoint for storing PDFs or Word documents.

In scenarios where we have multiple projects within the same landscape, how can we manage modifications to solution design or business process documents across these projects? Typically, in Solution Manager's Soldoc, we have options for release and versioning to track these details.

We would also like to know if there is specific documentation for the integration with SharePoint, such as documentation, customer success stories, etc.

Can you point me in the right direction if it is please.

Thanks for your insights!

entry.content:
@santosh12 
its same logic for all the fields.
Please find below for logics

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Object custom modifications review before update in production system
entry.content:
Hi,

Trying to migrate data using Migration Cockpit staging table approach. We have had issues with objects containing custom fields. We added custom fields in development system and transported them to quality and then production. Objects containing custom fields have had short dump in quality LTMOM, in migration cockpit fiori app message "upload canceled; field definitions of upload file x.xml are out of date" or "column sterilization failed". Fields seem to be right looking at the tables. Now new project has been made, transported to production. In production fiori objects containing custom fields are giving error "This migration object contains custom modifications that must be reviewed before the update can be applied. In order to proceed, execute the following option from the toolbar of SAP S/4HANA Migration Object Modeler: Update Object.". But this can not be performed in production system object modeler. Is there a work around for this and how to proceed? The transport of copies doesn't seem to be option...

Thanks

entry.title: Re: A Leap Forward in Encryption: TLS 1.3 Support in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Such a great sharing, it helps us lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS - CDS Watch does not display data
entry.content: My csv file as named as follows: cm.Books.cds => I changed to dm-Books.cds. Now all is fine.

entry.title: Re: Enabling WEBGUI Firefighter in SAP GRC
entry.content:
Dear Shivendra,

thanks for the Blog post, it is a good summarization of the basic configuration of the Web Based Firefighter.

Although most of the information and configuration steps are according to our documentation, I would like to clarifies some information in the post which is not accurate. The WEB Based Firefighter is available since SP04 from Access Control 12.0 (GRCFND_A V1200/8100), hence the configuration and the functionality works since that SP. 

About the Connector Settings, you can only maintain one, and only just one WEBGUI URL parameter. If you maintain multiple, then the coding will bring up randomly one (in fact the first one from the order how it was retrieved from the database, however as there are no ordering, it would be depends on the database architecture), and will be using that one. If you maintain "/N/UI2/FLP" (starting with /N), then the coding will open Fiori Launchpad. If SESSION_MANAGER is configured then the SAP Menu page will opens up, similar how the WebGUI (SAPGUI for HTML) would opens. If you maintain any other transaction (like NWBC, SU01....etc), then WebGUI will opens with the Transaction you maintained. The only limitation is that you need to maintain only one of the previous ones.

There are some slight inaccuracy in the limitation part as well. You do not need to close the Webgui Browser. It is an issue which happens if you have a single Application Server and you logon to the same System-Client-Host. SAPGUI for HTML can handle only a single Security Session by design and in this case there would be require two, one for Firefighter User and one for Firefighter ID. We suggest that - if you would like to use Firefighter ID pointing to the main GRC system where the System-Client-Host information would be the same - to set up at least two applications servers and configure your SM59 connection which was used by the Firefighter ID to point always the second application server and the normal logons should done in the first server. In this case the Host information will be differ. About the Log collection, Webdynpro Tile information is collected, Fiori is at the moment when I write this comment not supported. Another limitation is that only those logs are collected which is created and stored in the exact system where the Firefighter ID is pointed. If you use Fiori Launchpad, where the tiles are pointing to multiple systems, then (especially in Webdynpros and Transactional tiles) you might see that the logs are not collected. We are supporting embedded scenario, as the logs are only collected from a single system, if the logs are not on that system then it is not collectable.

I hope this clears up some possible misunderstanding and made you blog post more valuable for the community.

Best regards, Mate

entry.title: Re: Balancing field "Profit Center" in line item 002 not...
entry.content:
There is Work around for such issue go to FAGL3KEH choose the GL line item as it shows  002 put this GL and the Profit Center default to temporary reverse it and then revert the changes.

 

Note: This is Development Activity

entry.title: Re: Why our company colors are always messed up after eac...
entry.content: Hi Barbara,

entry.title: Re: Why our company colors are always messed up after eac...
entry.content: Hi Barbara, yes that is correct, we use SF theming. If I chose the wrong tag, sorry but I couldn't find the correct one

entry.title: Re: BOM template qty in PO
entry.content:
Solved

1. Create a UDF in document header. 

2. Set FMS in quantity in detail tab 

3. Enter parent item qty in the UDF

Query for FMS

SELECT
CASE WHEN T1.[Code] IS NULL THEN $[OPOR.U_ParentQty]
ELSE T1.[Quantity]*$[OPOR.U_ParentQty] END

FROM OITM T0
LEFT JOIN ITT1 T1 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T1.[Code]
WHERE $[$38.1.0] = T0.[ItemCode]

Hope it will help someone faced same issue~

entry.title: Re: Withholding tax does'nt appear when I simulate or posting
entry.content: This is the same error and solution which fix my issue. i needed to populate the amount in the wht tab of the tTCODE FB70 , when I configured the max and minimin things get weel for me...thanks so much for your contribution.

entry.title: Re: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content: Would have been great if you had also shared the solution.

entry.title: CDS Cube View for Purchase Orders
entry.content:
Hello experts,
I would like to use an analytical cube view for Purchase Order, Purchase Order Item and Purchase Order Item Schedule Line. Is there a cube view that I can use? I am looking for something similar to the I_SalesOrderCube. I only have the CDS views so far: I_PurchaseOrderAPI01, I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 & I_PurOrdScheduleLineAPI01, but I would have to convert them to a cube myself.
Greetings Niels

entry.title: Re: SAC SSO Dynamic User Creatinon
entry.content:
The SAML mapping column is only shown when you are mapping on a 'custom' value. When mapping on userid or email, then there is no SAML mapping column.

 

Read my blog here about the problems of using SAML SSO mapped on 'email' with dynamic user creation. Its 'ok', but you don't get the userID of your choice. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-security-amp-data-access-controls-overview/ba-p/13805353 (the blog is focused on Datasphere but has a section on userIDs for SAP Analytics Cloud)

To get the USERID of your choice you need to use the SCIM v2 API which is used typically with user provisioning tools (like SAP Identity Provisioning Services) or just direct coding the API with your own solution. 

If you have already loads of users with the 'wrong' userID you can use my sample scripts to 'migrate' the user ID. Sample 2666 'Migrate userID' will create a new user off the source, copying all the user properties, like roles/teams etc.  You'll also find my user guide for the samples handy to explain some practical and other handy things about the mappings for example.

 

Overall, you'd be better to map on USERID and ask Azure to return a USERID as the Subject NameID rather than an email. You can still authenticate by identifying yourself by email. Sometimes your userID has funny characters that are not permitted.  In which case, manipulate the Subject nameid dynamically. 

USERID must not contain unsupported characters, any lowercase character, a ‘-’ or more than 20 characters

Manipulating the NameID when using SAP Identity Authentication, Microsoft Azure, Microsoft ADFS, Okta

 

 

Kind regards, Matthew

entry.title: Re: Curious? Previewing the SAP Companion (formerly Web Assistant)
entry.content:
Hi @peterpopovic ,

Indeed, not all of the integrated applications offer the URL field for SAP Companion configuration. This is due to the different implementation models and scope of implementation per target application which is decided on by the target application product team itself.

Take care,

Kristina

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding API for Retiring Assets to External C...
entry.content: Hi, Thank you for your prompt response. I hope you are doing well. Actually, this API caters to the requirement without a customer. I need an API that can be used to retire a fixed asset with reference to a customer.

entry.title: Ideas for Fiori Tools: More sandbox functionality, global NPM dependencies
entry.content:
OK, so I realize I ended up on the SAP Community Forum, but I clicked the "Support" link from the SAP Fiori Tools VS Code plugin page, which was supposed to go to "https://ask.sapfioritools.com/", and this is where it led me.

I was hoping there is a place to submit suggestions, and hopefully someone working on Fiori tools gets this message.

So here goes:

Idea 1: Add more comprehensive sandbox functionality to Fiori Tools

Currently, you have the option to run an app in a mock sandbox that ships with the UI5 SDK.

It would be nice if you could configure and run a sandbox (or several sandboxes), as part of Fiori Tools, to which you could deploy multiple apps locally, to also test things like navigation, etc.

What we need is perhaps a set of tools to manage the local sandboxes and deploy apps to them.

Idea 2: Install NPM library dependencies globally, instead of in each project

Currently, when you create a Fiori or UI5 app, you install all the dependencies in the project. This is the normal way to do JS frontend development, but often JS developers are working on a small number of apps, or even just one.

Fiori developers regularly work with a large number of projects. When you install the same dependencies into each project every time, you end up with increased disk usage space and, more importantly, you run down your SSD write cycles unnecessarily with thousands of the same files each time.

It would be nice, for developing Fiori apps, if the tools by default install dependencies globally, so they are not duplicated in each project.

------

If there is a better place/forum to raise these suggestions to the Fiori Tools developer, I would like to know, please!

entry.title: Accessing token details
entry.content: Hi, We've got a client with a Shopify site and they require customers with a SSO on your platform. We require the following details of them but they aren't very tech savvy so can you help us, help them find these details, also any other details you think are needed on this please let me know:IDP Display Name: Authorize Endpoint:Token Endpoint: Client Id: Client Secret: Scopes: Send Client Credentials in Header: Yes or No?Grant Type: options below:- Authorization Code Grant- Password Grant- Implicit Flow- Authorization Code PKCE- Retrieve OAuth tokens

entry.title: cds add http produced this error message: TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
entry.content:
in SAP BAS in a project, I was intended to add a http service bia this command cds add http. I received this error message: 

TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
at Function.keys (<anonymous>)
at /home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/cds-dk/lib/init/template/http/index.js:179:41
at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
at /home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/cds-dk/lib/init/template/http/index.js:159:26
at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
at #generateRequests (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/cds-dk/lib/init/template/http/index.js:154:24)
at HttpTemplate.run (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/cds-dk/lib/init/template/http/index.js:56:27)
at async CDSGenerator._process (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/cds-dk/lib/init/index.js:154:13)
at async CDSGenerator.add (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/cds-dk/lib/init/index.js:80:9)
at async Object.add (/home/user/.node_modules_global/lib/node_modules/@sap/cds-dk/bin/add.js:114:5)

I'm using the latest npm , @sap/cds, @sap/cds-dk. What could be the issue?

entry.title: Re: Select the file from the desktop and attach the docum...
entry.content: Yes of course

entry.title: Re: Cloud API Enablement - FAQ
entry.content:
Hi @fgfgfg3r43456534 ,

for ABAP Cloud ready tier 1 developments you must always used released APIs, if you use standard API, which is not released, then your code will not be tier 1 compliant. Therefore the clear recommendation is to wrap unreleased BAPI in tier 2 instead of using standard unreleased API.

We recommend using wrapper generator instead of developing it manually: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-generate-a-wrapper-for-function-modules-bapis-in-tier-2/ba-p/13692790#M172258 

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: How to Reduce Database DTU on SAP Commerce Cloud

Unfortunately we can't determine which tables/queries are involved. 

Is there any blog how to resolve DB deadlocks and find the root cause in the code?
Is there any SQL statement to find out the involved DB table of DB deadlocks?

entry.title: Letter of Credit Management (49D) Integration with SD module
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private edition.  Could you please advise whether Scope Item (49D) includes Integration with Sales Module (SD module) Functionality. 

Also, please advise whether scope item (49D) is available for India.

We need to assign Financial Transaction (Letter of Credit - Receivable) created in FTR_CREATE  in Sales Order. 

Further based on this assignment, we need to have controls based on Letter of Credit (LC) validity and value in the subsequent process of sales order like Delivery & Billing document. 

Could you please advise whether this is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone - Set up Environment
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

I'm trying to successfully onboard to the SAP Build Work Zone (advance edition), but I'm struggeling with the Configurator. Everytime I try to set up the Environment using the default domain tpe, it is saying "Could not set up the environment" (Error Details: createCompany, Forbidden).

In the Settings the IAS and the IPS are already connected and I don't know how to solve this issue. 

Does anyone of you experience the same and know how to fix it?

Thanks a lot in advance!

Br, Marvin

entry.title: Re: Create Customer project screen of custom field make it read only
entry.content: Added Professional Services tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: Defining Compensation Planning Route Map- Skipping CE...
entry.content:
Hi,

as far as I know this is not possible. You cannot use/apply any EC rules that have an impact on the route map in compensation.

What you could is to use the "modify route map" feature, after you have started the worksheets you could delete the step of the CEO in the respective worksheets.

entry.title: Re: Change Default mta.yaml filepath in BTP CICD pipeline config.yaml
entry.content:
Hi @hatrigt,

Sorry for the late update. In general, it is possible to influence the path to the mta.yaml file but then you need to use the configuration mode as the source repository instead of the Job editor. In that way, you can define 2 jobs, one pointing to mta.yaml on root (by default ./)and another one pointing to mta.yaml file in sub folder with the following configuration in .pipeline/config.yaml file.

steps:
  mtaBuild:
    source: <path_to_the folder_containing_mta.yaml>

I hope this answers your questions. In case of any further questions, please get back to us.

Thanks and Regards,

Nikitha

entry.title: Re: Extraneous module (punycode) preventing from deployin...

entry.title: New Lead to Cash Variant: Lead to Cash (Consumer Industries B2C) for Cloud Deployment
entry.content:
With Lead to Cash (Consumer Industries B2C) for Cloud Deployment, we  are introducing a new reference Business Process Variant of SAP Lead to Cash.

It is a template process based on best practices as well as common scenarios, and can be adapted or extended based on your specific requirements.

In today's competitive consumer industries landscape, businesses are constantly seeking innovative solutions to streamline operations, enhance customer experiences, and drive sales performance. The SAP Lead to Cash for Cloud Deployment (L2C) has long been recognized as a powerful process for managing the end-to-end sales process, from lead generation to order fulfillment. Now, SAP has unveiled a tailored variant of Lead to cash specifically designed for Consumer Industries: Lead to Cash (Consumer Industries B2C) for Cloud Deployment.

Lead to Cash for Consumer Industries is an all-encompassing process that empowers organizations to optimize their sales operations, provide personalized customer experiences, and gain actionable insights to drive growth. This variant is strategically developed to address the unique challenges and requirements of consumer-focused businesses, offering a range of advanced features and capabilities to address the specific needs of the industry.

One of the key highlights of Lead to Cash for Consumer Industries is its integrated omnichannel capabilities. Companies today understand the importance of providing a consistent and seamless customer experience across various touchpoints, including online, in-store and mobile. With Lead to Cash for Consumer Industries, businesses can effectively manage sales and customer interactions across multiple channels, ensuring a cohesive and personalized experience at every touchpoint.

In the new SAP End-to-End process (Lead to Cash - Consumer Industries B2C), SAP Order Management Foundation (OMF) plays a central role. Some of the business benefits of SAP OMF include increased automation of order processing, improved order accuracy, enhanced visibility into order status, and streamlined order fulfillment. Please follow this link to learn more about SAP Order Management Foundation.

 

Explore the new variant:

Lead to cash (Consumer Industries B2C) for Cloud Deployment

 

Learn More about Lead to Cash and Integration by checking out our latest whitepaper:

Integrate to Innovate

entry.title: Re: How to create a custom WSDL in SAP CPI with some custom fields.
entry.content:
Hi,

currently, there is no way to generate a Custom-WSDL in CPI.

If you still have a PI/PO environment, you can recreate the structure there and then generate the WSDL using Integrated Configuration. You only need to replace the URL within the WSDL, which is located at the very bottom of the WSDL.

Otherwise, there is also this BLOG -> https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/hci-using-eclipse-wsdl-editor-for-soap-based-integration/ba-p/13190037

Best regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: how to read field with namespace error Undeclared nam...
entry.content:
Hi Mark Fryu,

the n0 namespace is not declared in your xml document. Probably instead of 

xmlns="http://cxf.component.camel.apache.org/"

you meant

xmlns:n0="http://cxf.component.camel.apache.org/"

BR, Benjamin

entry.title: enhance old VIM analytics report
entry.content:
Hi techies,

Recently i came across the old VIM analytics report (T-code : /n/opt/vim_analytics), the major difference between the new and old vim analytics report is the number of fields.

Hence, I want to know if there are any explicit or implicit enhancement options available in the old report so that I can customise it and add few more fields in the output ALV of the report? 

PS- tried looking for custom exits and BADIs but couldn't find any.

entry.title: How to Deactivate a Sales Employee in Master Data?
entry.content:
I created a sales employee master record using T-Code: VPE1

One of the sales employees has already left the company.

Can I deactivate this employee in the master record to prevent them from being selected in other areas, such as the Partner Function in the customer master data?

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content: @Abdelaleem you just need to experiment with adding MDF object to a custom scheme. That's done in Manage data, create new Report Schema Configuration Entity. And then in Report Object Configuration Entity you search for the object on which you want to report and for Is Root you put Yes. And keep in mind that you should have the schema in sub-domain schema list of the object in Report Object Configuration Entity.

entry.title: Re: Update Header text of PR through Interface
entry.content:
In ABAPn either use FM SAVE_TEXT or a BAPI such as BAPI_PR_CHANGE (table parameters PRITEMTEXT and PRHEADERTEXT for long texts) and COMMIT WORK or BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT.

Hint: To identify the key values for the FM, display the long text in full windows (usually double-click on the text windows) and in the menu navigate goto, header.

Using IDOC (check your version via menu Tools, ALE)

  • Message Type – PREQCR1.
  • Basic Type – PREQCR104.
  • Segments  E1BPMEREQITEMTEXT and E1BPMEREQHEADTEXT (any resemblance to BAPI parameters is neither accidental nor coincidental)

entry.title: How to compair all line item field values
entry.content: I have line item itab ' lt_item' so there is field 'Zcomp' ...so i want to put condition that if all entries of Zcomp  = 'A0' then call class_xx  else leave. ....so main question is how to check one entries with others if they are similar or not ...

entry.title: Re: Consolidation breakdown categories
entry.content:
Dear Customer, You can check it in Define FS item app if you want. In the app, you can check all FS item and its Breakdown category. We don't have a tool for cloud customer to download all BDA and FS item.

I guess Define FS item would be best way to check it.

You can download the list including FS item information and BDA together in there.

entry.title: Re: Language based Email Triggering from IAS portal
entry.content: saddly this is not the issue. Reproduce de problem. A neu user will be created and an e-mail will be send in the user language. Thist is working since i reduce the email send just to onboardees For the neue Onboardee (witch have in Custom 12 value YES) now it will take the value DE and it will send the mail fron ONBOARDEE in German. The problem ist not the assigment of the Email template (ONBOARDEE): is working The problem ist not that the mail ist not send in the Language of the user (i extra put in onbehalf in Email template ONBOARDEE 3 languages): Now is workig because if you look in User managment in User details now the users do naot habe Languege field empty. The problem ist that the users do not have the correct Language in IAS: { "type": "valueMapping", "sourcePaths": ["$.defaultLocale"], -------------This is working 🙂 Thanks "targetPath": "$.locale", "defaultValue": "DE", "valueMappings": [ {"key":["en_US"],"mappedValue":"EN"}, {"key":["cz_CZ"],"mappedValue":"CZ"}, {"key":["hr_HR"],"mappedValue":"HR"}, {"key":["pl_PL"],"mappedValue":"PL"}, ----------Thist is not working (the valueMapping) {"key":["ro_RO"],"mappedValue":"RO"}, {"key":["sk_SK"],"mappedValue":"SK"}, {"key":["bg_BG"],"mappedValue":"BG"}, {"key":["de_DE"],"mappedValue":"DE"} ] }, All the users are receiving now German as language (the default DE) and not there language For example look at the usres with the following loginnamens: RO61130244 CZ18046298 SK31135164 They all have German as a language even if they have in defalutLocale in SF: ro_RO, cz_CZ, or sk_SK If I remove the "defaultValue": "DE", you will see that by all users the language in User management/user Details will disapear Then the mails will use the Template ONBOARDEE but the EN version since no user will have the info about the Language 😞 Regards Cosmin

entry.title: Re: Update Header text of PR through Interface
entry.content: Hi Raymond, thank you so much for the Response, answered my Query

entry.title: Repository Job from script
entry.content:
Hi IDM Experts,
To meet one of the requirement, I wanted to understand -
Is it possible to run Repository Job using script used in one of the process.

I tried uProvision, but as it runs task, I couldn't point to the job

I also tried uRunJobNow by giving JobId, this eventually triggered job however as this internal function has no place to input RepositoryId, it eventually fails.

Regards,

Ravi

entry.title: Re: Consolidation breakdown categories
entry.content: I guess my query was not clear, I understand that breakdown categories are available in define FS Items, my query is for how do you know to which FS item we have to assign a specific break down category

entry.title: Re: How to compair all line item field values
entry.content: Not very clear what the question is. If you compare one item, and it's NOT equal, it means that all items are NOT equal.

entry.title: eDocument cockpit -> CPI -> ANAF response message error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We want to connect the eDocument to the Romanian tax authorities (ANAF) through the CPI middleware. Three calls are necessary for this, all this calls worked. In these calls, we receive the DownloadID, UploadID, and a ZIP file from ANAF in the third call.

We are unsure how to create the response for the eDocument. The edoccockpit does not return any errors:

So nothing is being processed and the transaction is still listed as "RED status" We are using this service consumer, and I suspect that the issue lies with the "EncodedZippedResponse" field.

The ZIP file contains two files. My question is:

Should I convert the whole ZIP file to Base64 and send it back to the eDocument? Or should I unpack it first and  send only parts of the ZIP file? Does anyone have experience with this topic?

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Re: Mask in CJ20N - "Screen" field
entry.content: Ok, so I entered the project number in the "Project def." field and hit enter yes. And after that the field "Screen" is not appearing. This might be a silly question, but is there any customizing where I link the project mask to the project profile or to he project type or project template? because I don't have that customization and maybe that's the reason why "screen" is not appearing? thanks!

entry.title: Re: Mass Export of Performance Forms in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Dren,

the classic Report function is deprecated in the Test System now. 😕 I read a few weeks ago, that the function will be somewhere else, but I can not find any information about it. If anybody has any information, I would really appreciate it, if you could share it. 🙂

BR Linda

entry.title: Re: Consolidation breakdown categories
entry.content: For the question, the FS item should have which BDA is totally depend on yourself. We have some predefined content and you can check the example. But if you want to add more FS item, yes, you need to decide which BDA should be used based on demand. We don't have guide on this action because it 's very customized.

entry.title: Re: Create CDS Entity in system 2 based on table in system 1
entry.content:
Hello @Oleg_Vokh,

I thought of this an option, but felt scheduling a job every min is something of an overkill.

As mentioned by other we are looking at using Virtual tables, which is bit easier.

Regards,

Naga

entry.title: Re: Create CDS Entity in system 2 based on table in system 1

Regards,

Naga
